summary: Invitation Page Enrichment - All tests passed. The participant invitation view (InvitationPage) now aligns with the organizer view (AppointmentDetail) in terms of information richness. 3 critical adjustments verified: 1) EngagementSummary grid visible at top (penalty amount 50 EUR, tolerance 0 min, cancellation 24h), 2) Meeting join link shown as prominent block ONLY for finalized participants (security verified), 3) Trust signal '1 participant a déjà confirmé son engagement' displayed when confirmed_count > 0.

backend_pytest: ✅ other_participants have status field for badge coloring
frontend_playwright: ✅ EngagementSummary grid at top with penalty amount (50 EUR), tolerance (0 min), cancellation (24h)
✅ FinancialBreakdown block shows compensation % (60%), commission % (20%), charity % (20%)
✅ Trust signal displayed: '1 participant a déjà confirmé son engagement'
✅ Meeting join block visible for finalized participant with correct URL
✅ Meeting join block hidden for non-finalized participant (security)
✅ Participant badges with correct colors (green=accepted, amber=pending)
✅ Visual design preserved (same colors, badges, components)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend invitations.py correctly returns all new fields in appointment object
✅ Backend correctly calculates confirmed_count from other_participants with status in (accepted, accepted_guaranteed)
✅ Backend correctly hides meeting_join_url for non-finalized participants (security)
✅ Frontend InvitationPage.js imports and uses EngagementSummary and FinancialBreakdown components
✅ Frontend InvitationAppointmentDetails.js shows trust signal only when confirmedCount > 0
✅ Frontend InvitationAppointmentDetails.js shows meeting join block only for finalized participants
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invitation page enrichment verified. The GET /api/invitations/{token} endpoint now returns: appointment.cancellation_deadline_hours, appointment.penalty_amount, appointment.penalty_currency, appointment.location_display_name, appointment.affected_compensation_percent, appointment.platform_commission_percent, appointment.charity_percent, confirmed_count, total_participants. Frontend displays EngagementSummary grid at top, FinancialBreakdown block, trust signal when confirmed_count > 0, and meeting join link only for finalized participants.

engagement_summary.description: Grid at top showing penalty amount, tolerance, cancellation deadline
engagement_summary.verification: Visible in 1 second at top of invitation page

trust_signal.description: 'X participant(s) a/ont déjà confirmé son/leur engagement'
trust_signal.verification: Visible when confirmed_count > 0, hidden when confirmed_count = 0

meeting_link_security.description: Meeting join URL only exposed to finalized participants
meeting_link_security.verification: Empty for status=invited, visible for status=accepted_guaranteed

mocked_apis.Stripe: Dev mode - payment methods are pm_dev_* format
